title: Crashes due to fuzzed input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value DOUBLE PRECISION, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table(name, value) VALUES('Test', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR created_at > TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Crashes from executing fuzzed SQL statements
